message:
feat(tui): implement Ballast Operations screen key handlers and layout (bd-xzt.3.5)

Add screen-specific key handling for the Ballast screen (S5):
- j/k/↑↓ cursor navigation through volume inventory
- Enter/Space to toggle volume detail pane
- d to close detail pane
- Screen::Ballast now triggers FetchTelemetry on tick

Add BallastPane enum and responsive layout builders following
the TimelinePane pattern (narrow: list+footer, wide: list+detail+footer).

16 new tests (11 update, 5 layout), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
